# MPC

Receding-horizon control that repeatedly solves a constrained finite-horizon optimization problem.

<div class="algorithm-meta">
  <span>Control</span>
  <span>predictive control, constrained optimization, receding horizon</span>
  <span>Mermaid</span>
</div>

## Flowchart

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[Measure current state] --> B[Predict future dynamics]
    B --> C[Form horizon cost and constraints]
    C --> D[Solve finite-horizon control problem]
    D --> E[Apply first control action]
    E --> F[Shift horizon forward]
    F --> G{Task finished?}
    G -- No --> A
    G -- Yes --> H[Stop]
```

## Notes

- MPC applies only the first optimized action before re-solving at the next step.
- It handles multi-variable systems and explicit constraints naturally.
